messages: Gaddy: you've got this, keep up the great work!
Alice: can someone send me the report by Friday?
policy_note: A request with no acceptance or volunteer is not yet a commitment.

messages: Gaddy: if they send the quote, I'll approve it
policy_note: Conditional promise where condition has not been met → ignore, not a commitment yet.

messages:
Gaddy: I'm waiting for the bank to process the loan
Gaddy: nothing I can do until they respond

expected_commitments.context: I'm waiting for the bank to process the loan

messages: Gaddy: I will send the documents by 5pm

expected_commitments.context: I will send the documents by 5pm

messages: Gaddy: I will send the documents when I can

expected_commitments.context: I will send the documents when I can

policy_note: 'when I can' is not a concrete deadline → null.

messages: Gaddy: I will send the documents by end of week

expected_commitments.context: I will send the documents by end of week

messages: Gaddy: I will send the documents by tomorrow

expected_commitments.context: I will send the documents by tomorrow

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-100", "chat_id": "120363000003@g.us", "chat_name": "Report Review", "committed_party": "Alice", "required_action": "Send the documents", "deadline": "2025-01-07", "context": "Alice will send the documents by tomorrow", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: actually Bob will handle it instead of Alice

expected_commitments.context: actually Bob will handle it instead of Alice

policy_note: Party handoff: update existing commitment with new party.

messages: Gaddy: Alice will send the documents, I'll make sure of it

expected_commitments.context: Alice will send the documents, I'll make sure of it

policy_note: Speaker asserts another person will do it → commitment with that person as party.

messages:
Alice: we need someone to prepare the report by Friday
Bob: I can't, I'm swamped
Charlie: I'll do it, I'll have it ready by Friday

expected_commitments.context: Alice asked for someone to prepare the report, Charlie volunteered

messages: Gaddy: I'll reserve the meeting room for Tuesday

expected_commitments.context: I'll reserve the meeting room for Tuesday

messages: Gaddy: I'll make sure the invoice is taken care of by Friday

expected_commitments.context: I'll make sure the invoice is taken care of by Friday

policy_note: Vague indirect action ('make sure it's taken care of') → extract the underlying action.

messages: Dana: I'll take care of the invoice payment today

expected_commitments.context: I'll take care of the invoice payment today

messages:
Gaddy: forget about calling the supplier
Gaddy: I found another source

expected_commitments.context: forget about calling the supplier, I found another source

messages:
Gaddy: forget about the old supplier order
Gaddy: I need to call a new supplier about a different order

expected_commitments.context: I need to call a new supplier about a different order

policy_note: Dismiss old + new commitment with same action but different target → new only.

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-456", "chat_id": "972503333333@c.us", "chat_name": "Supplier - Mike", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Call the supplier", "deadline": null, "context": "Need to call the supplier about the order", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: I'll do it, I'll call the supplier today

expected_commitments.context: I'll do it, I'll call the supplier today

policy_note: 'Will do' is a future promise, not a completion.
